title: Calibration Algorithm Engineer
rationale: The role aligns well with Ben's programming skills and analytical experience, but the focus on calibration and the MSc requirement introduce some gaps.

title: Sensing Architect (hardware & algorithm)
rationale: While Ben has relevant skills in data analysis and modeling, the role's focus on sensing systems and the requirement for an MSc or PhD in a different field limit its alignment with his profile.
